enemies.name: Toxic Slime
enemies.line: It bubbles like expired soda and looks personally offended.

enemies.name: Rust Rat
enemies.line: A rat wearing scrap metal like it pays rent here.

enemies.name: Cable Wraith
enemies.line: A haunted cable bundle. Somehow still charges microtransactions.

bosses.name: The Sewer King
bosses.line: He rules a kingdom of sludge. Honestly, still better than some landlords.
